title: Traceable and auditable end-to-end secure data file request
abstract: An example computing system includes memory and one or more processors configured to obtain a request for at least one of one or more data files or one or more information fields from a first computing system and store metadata associated with the request. The one or more processors are configured to generate a request notification in response to the request, the request notification including a link containing an authorization token and being configured to facilitate access to one or more pre-signed upload URLs, for the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields, the authorization token being configured to provide one or more encryption policies applicable to the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields. The one or more processors are configured to send the request notification to a second computing system.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A service provider computing system comprising: one or more memories; and one or more processors coupled to the one or more memories, the one or more processors being configured to: obtain a request for at least one of one or more data files or one or more information fields from a first computing system; store metadata associated with the request in the one or more memories; generate a request notification in response to the request, the request notification including a link containing an authorization token and being configured to facilitate access to one or more pre-signed upload Uniform Resource Locators (URLs), for the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields, the authorization token being configured to provide one or more encryption policies applicable to the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields; and send the request notification to a second computing system. 2. The service provider computing system of claim 1, wherein the link authorizes a user of the second computing system to: encrypt the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields in accordance with the one or more encryption policies to generate at least one of one or more encrypted data files or one or more encrypted information fields; and send the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields to the first computing system. 3. The service provider computing system of claim 2, wherein the link is configured to, upon selection by the user of the second computing system, encrypt the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields and send the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields. 4. The service provider computing system of claim 3, wherein the link is further configured to, prior to sending the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the 

one or more encrypted information fields, digitally sign the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields. 5. The service provider computing system of any of claims 1-4, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: obtain metadata associated with an upload responsive to the request notification; store the metadata associated with the upload; generate an upload notification; and send the upload notification to the first computing system. 6. The service provider computing system of claim 5, wherein the upload notification comprises one or more pre-signed download URLs. 7. The service provider computing system of any of claims 1-6, wherein the request comprises at least one indication of a level of encryption and wherein the one or more encryption policies are indicative of the level of encryption. 8. The service provider computing system of claim 7, wherein the at least one indication of a level of encryption comprises a plurality of indications of different respective levels of encryption, and wherein each of the plurality of indications corresponds to at least one data element within the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields. 9. The service provider computing system of any of claims 1-8, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: obtain metadata associated with at least one of a viewing, an encryption, a decryption, a saving, an edit to a name or content, or an unauthorized access attempt associated with the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields; store the metadata; and responsive to a user request, generate an audit report based at least in part on the metadata. 10. The service provider computing system of claim 9, wherein the audit report is further based on metadata associated with each viewing, encryption, decryption, saving, editing to a 

name or content, and unauthorized access attempt associated with the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields. 11. The service provider computing system of any of claims 1-10, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: store, in the one or more memories, at least a portion of a key associated with the one or more encryption policies, the at least the portion of the key being configured to decrypt at least one of one or more encrypted data files or one or more encrypted information fields together with at least another portion of the key, the at least another portion of the key being stored in a geographically separate location from the one or more memories. 12. A user computing system comprising: one or more memories; and one or more processors coupled to the one or more memories, the one or more processors being configured to: obtain, from a first computing device, a request notification for at least one of one or more data files or one or more information fields, the request notification including a link containing an authorization token, the link being configured to facilitate access to one or more pre-signed upload URLs for the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields, the authorization token being configured to provide one or more encryption policies applicable to the at least one of the one or more data files or one or more information fields; obtain, from a user, the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields; encrypt the at least one of one or more data files or the one or more information fields in accordance with the one or more encryption policies to generate at least one of one or more encrypted data files or one or more encrypted information fields; and send, via the one or more pre-signed upload URLs, the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields to a second computing device. 13. The user computing system of claim 12, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to, prior to sending the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files 

or the one or more encrypted information fields to a second computing device, digitally sign the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields. 14. The user computing system of claim 12 or claim 13, wherein one or more encryption policies comprise a plurality of encryption policies of different respective levels of encryption, and wherein each of the plurality of encryption policies corresponds to at least one data element within the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields. 15. The user computing system of any of claims 12-14, wherein as part of encrypting the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields, the one or more processors are configured to selectively encrypt at least one data element of at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields such that the at least one data element is at least one of encrypted using a) a different key than a remainder of the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields or b) an additional level of encryption than at least a portion of the remainder of the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields. 16. A first computing system comprising: one or more memories; and one or more processors coupled to the one or more memories, the one or more processors being configured to: authenticate a first user of a first computing system based on a user login; obtain, from the first user via a user interface, a request for at least one of one or more data files or one or more information fields from a second user of a second computing system; send, to the second computing system, a notification of the request; obtain, from the second computing system, an upload notification indicative of the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields being uploaded; download, in response to a download request from the user, at least one of one or more encrypted data files or one or more encrypted information fields, the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information 

 fields corresponding to the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields; and decrypt the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields. 17. The first computing system of claim 16, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: generate metadata associated with decryption of the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields; and send the metadata to the second computing system. 18. The first computing system of claim 17, wherein the metadata comprises an identification associated with the user, a time and date of the decryption, and an identification of the at least one of the one or more encrypted data files or the one or more encrypted information fields that were decrypted. 19. The first computing system of any of claims 16-18, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: obtain, from a second user, a request for an audit associated with the at least one of the one or more data files or the one or more information fields; send an audit request to the second computing system; and obtain, from the second computing system and in response to the audit request, an audit report, wherein the audit report is based on metadata associated with at least one of a viewing, an encryption, a decryption, a saving, an edit to a name or content, or an unauthorized access attempt of the at least one of one or more data files or the one or more information fields. 20. The first computing system of claim 19, wherein the audit report is based on metadata associated with each viewing, encryption, decryption, saving, editing to a name or content, and unauthorized access attempt associated with the at least one of one or more data files or the one or more information fields.
